guest.title: Create Account
guest.description: Sign up and complete a quick verification. Provide ID, selfie, and phone number.

guest.title: Search Routes
guest.description: Enter your pickup and destination. See available rides in real-time with fares and host ratings.

guest.title: Book & Pay
guest.description: Select seats and pay instantly through your wallet or card. No cash transactions.

guest.title: Get PIN
guest.description: Receive a unique PIN code for check-in. Share it only with your assigned host.

guest.title: Track Live
guest.description: See real-time location of your ride, ETA, and chat with your host and fellow passengers.

guest.title: Complete & Rate
guest.description: Reach your destination, auto-exit chat, and rate your experience to help others.

host.title: Verify & Setup
host.description: Complete KYC verification. Upload vehicle photos and add your vehicle capacity.

host.title: Post Route
host.description: Enter start, destination, stops, seat count, and minimum fare. One-tap for favorite routes.

host.title: Receive Bookings
host.description: See guest details, ratings, and age before accepting. Maintain full control over who boards.

host.title: Verify PINs
host.description: Check guest PINs at pickup to confirm their identity and update seat availability.

host.title: Complete Trip
host.description: Drive your normal route. Guests auto-leave chat at their stops. You close trip when done.

host.title: Earn & Rate
host.description: Get paid instantly per guest completion. Rate passengers to build your community trust.
